name: cave-bandit-camp
summary: A bandit crew has squatted in a natural cave. Messy, stinking, half-organized — bedrolls around a smoky fire, loot piled where it landed, a watch-point near the mouth.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: irregular — one main chamber plus a back nook

primary_palette.note: central smoky fire, bedrolls radiating out, crate-seats
stolen cargo dumped — half-open chest, rolled rug, sacks
working camp — cooking setup, firewood stocked, butchery
stolen cart wedged into the cave — contents being sorted onto the floor

story_prompts: full crew home, drunk and loud — easy to scout, hard to surprise
skeleton watch — two bandits left behind, rest out on a job
recently raided by rivals — bodies, the loot stripped
the crew hides a kidnap victim in the back nook — bound, gagged, alive
they've been here too long — disease is spreading through the bedrolls

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: cave-dark with firelight — ambient low, strong campfire glow in the main chamber

anti_patterns: no built walls — use rough cave outline (iw or rounded corners)
do not make it tidy — scatter loot and refuse, bedrolls at uneven angles
the fire should be near-centered under a natural chimney, not against a wall
watch position near the mouth should be visibly distinct — a single bedroll or crate-seat separated from the main cluster
